meta.title: Agent Forge — AI Agent Framework | ohara.systems
meta.description: A framework for building, customizing, and deploying AI agents — with full control over behavior, tools, and orchestration.

home.description: A framework for building, customizing, and deploying AI agents — from idea to production-ready system.

overview.description: Framework for building, customizing, and deploying AI agents with full control over behavior and orchestration.

hero.description: A framework for building, customizing, and deploying AI agents — with full control over behavior, tools, and orchestration. From single assistants to multi-agent pipelines.

concepts.title: Define Agent Behavior
concepts.description: Describe how the agent decides, which tools it uses, and how it responds to context.

concepts.title: Orchestration & Pipelines
concepts.description: Connect agents into multi-step pipelines. Sequential, parallel, or event-driven.

concepts.title: Self-hosted & Private
concepts.description: No vendor lock-in, no cloud dependency. Full control over data, models, and infrastructure.
